ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Proposal Presented for PE service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal Presented") && (ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c) || ISNULL(Implementation_Fee__c) || ISNULL(Monthly_Fee__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Proposal Date, Implementation Fee, and Monthly Fee.
